zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Neville於1285年之後出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯可頓時，她的父親Sir Robert de Nevill8748歲，母親Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd8754歲。她於大約1298年與Robert FitzRalph在英國波藍德格斯托可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1346年11月17日在英國英格蘭越可爾格利索普，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾格利斯索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Neville于1285年之后出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯可頓时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Nevill8748岁，母亲Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd8754岁。她于大约1298年与Robert FitzRalph在英国波藍德格斯托可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1346年11月17日在英国英格兰越可爾格利索普，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾格利斯索普。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Neville was born after 1285, in Scotton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert de Nevill, was 8748 and her mother, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, was 8754. She married Robert FitzRalph about 1298, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 17 November 1346, in Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Neville est née après 1285, à Scotton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Nevill, avait 8748 ans et sa mère, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, avait 8754 ans. Elle a épousé Robert FitzRalph environ 1298, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 novembre 1346, à Grimethorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Grimesthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Neville nach 1285 in Scotton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Nevill 8748 und ihre Mutter Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd 8754. Sie hat um 1298 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England Robert FitzRalph geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. November 1346 in Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Neville è nata il dopo il 1285 nel Scotton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert de Nevill, aveva 8748 anni e sua madre, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, aveva 8754 anni. Lei sposato Robert FitzRalph circa 1298, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 novembre 1346, nel Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Nevilleが1285年以後にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスコットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Nevillは8748歳，母Princess Angharad Verch Gruffuddは8754歳であった。約1298年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクでRobert FitzRalphと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1346年11月17日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグリメソルペで死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグリメスソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Neville(이)가 1285년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스콧에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Nevill(은)는 8748세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd(은)는 8754세였다. 그녀는 대략 1298년 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 Robert FitzRalph(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 11월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그라임소에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그라임스소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Neville nasceu após 1285, em Scotton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Nevill, tinha 8748 anos e sua mãe, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, tinha 8754 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert FitzRalph aproximadamente 1298, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de novembro de 1346, em Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Neville родилась после 1285 г. в местности скоттон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Nevill было 8748 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, 8754. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert FitzRalph около 1298 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 ноября 1346 г. в местности гриметаурп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности гриместаурп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Neville nació después de 1285, en Scotton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert de Nevill, tenía 8748 años y su mamá, Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd, tenía 8754 años. Se casó con Robert FitzRalph aproximadamente 1298, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de noviembre de 1346, en Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
